summary: Re-test after main agent's iteration-1 fixes. All 15 backend pytest tests PASS including new checkout-status paid + idempotency tests. All 3 fix-verification items confirmed working end-to-end: (1) GET /api/checkout/status returns 200 with payment_status='paid' via DB fallback and is idempotent (single order in /api/orders after two status calls); (2) /dashboard no longer redirects — stays at /dashboard with Logout + My Orders visible when Firebase is unconfigured; (3) Cart empty state has 'Continue Shopping' link with data-testid='continue-shopping-button'. Regression: landing page loads, design-studio renders Generate + prompt input, login/signup show Firebase warning banner.

ui_bugs.issue: Regression carry-over from iteration 1 (not in current fix list): hero headline still reads 'Join the Sustainable Fashion Movement' — 'CREATE WITH NATURE' keyword not present on the landing body. Low priority unless spec strictly requires that exact phrase.

action_items: [OPTIONAL/LOW] If spec strictly requires 'CREATE WITH NATURE' in landing hero, update HomePage hero copy; otherwise close.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_checkout_status DB-first fallback is pragmatic and correctly idempotent (guards duplicate orders via session_id lookup before insert). Acceptable given the Emergent stripe proxy limitation.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event hooks — consider migrating to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
DashboardPage now correctly uses useAuth; no parallel store-based auth redirect. Good.
test_credentials: Firebase intentionally not configured. Backend dev-trust uses X-User-Id/X-User-Email headers. Test UIDs generated per-run with TEST_UID_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run inserts and cleans up saved_designs; creates one payment_transactions + orders row per run (not deleted — acceptable, TEST_-scoped uid).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration-1 fixes verified (backend checkout status paid+idempotent, dashboard reachable, cart Continue Shopping testid). 15/15 backend tests pass. Added test_checkout_status_returns_paid and test_checkout_status_idempotent to backend_test.py. Only outstanding item is landing hero copy ('CREATE WITH NATURE' not present) which was already flagged in iteration 1 and is not part of the current fix list.
rca of the issue: N/A — no new issues found. Iteration-1 RCA (checkout status URL mismatch, dashboard redirect, cart label) all resolved by main agent and verified by this run.
